venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room on Deck 4. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Daily-changing menus blend international and destination-driven dishes. Complimentary wines and caviar at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant on Deck 7. Buffet breakfast and lunch with indoor and alfresco seating; reservations-only Italian dinner à la carte with handmade pasta, seafood, and regional wines. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Poolside casual dining by day. Evening Hot Rocks: guests cook prime meats, seafood, and vegetables on preheated volcanic lava stones tableside. On polar and expedition voyages blankets and heat lamps are provided for open-air dining under the stars. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: French fine-dining restaurant in partnership with Relais & Châteaux. Six-course tasting menu with wine pairings and luxury ingredients. No jacket required on Silver Wind — the ship maintains an elegant-casual dress code throughout. Dinner only; supplement $60 per person.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining with butler service. Full dinner service plus breakfast and light meal options delivered to every suite.
